subcodes.first_line: This is an Epistle from this Wronged One unto him who hath emigrated in the path of God and was [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من هذا المظلوم الی الذی هاجر فی سبیل الله و کان
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @chastisement and requital, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @suffering and imprisonment, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
